security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; script-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws: wss:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'
